title: Want to help garden birds? Don't feed them in warmer months, says RSPB
description: The UK's largest bird charity has issued new guidance advising people to stop using feeders to help wildlife thrive.
content:
Putting up bird feeders in your garden may seem kind but it could be putting some species at serious risk, according to the UK's largest bird charity.
Millions of us regularly put out food in the hope of attracting our feathered friends, but the Roya... [3518 chars]

title: Rory McIlroy holds share of Masters lead after flying start to his title defence
description: The defending Masters champion shares lead with Sam Burns after an opening 67 at Augusta, while Jon Rahm and Bryson DeChambeau both struggled
content: So this is what Rory McIlroy’s new normal looks like. The defending champion is footloose and fancy-free at Augusta National. He is plainly no longer of a mind to revel in the events of the 2025 Masters. McIlroy returned to Augusta, for so long a pla... [4991 chars]

title: Comical own goal gives Nottingham Forest edge in hard-fought draw at Porto
description: A bizarre own goal from Martim Fernandes earned Nottingham Forest a 1-1 draw at Porto after William’s opener in the Europa League quarter-final first leg
content:
On the night Chris Wood returned from six months on the sidelines, a freakish own goal by the Porto defender Martim Fernandes earned Nottingham Forest a draw and fostered optimism of advancing to the Europa League semi-finals.

title: 'We should not be at the mercy of events abroad' - Starmer
description: The prime minister says "shocks" like the conflict in Iran are becoming more frequent.
content:
The UK must become more resilient to deal with a "volatile and dangerous" world where "shocks" like the conflict in Iran are frequent, the prime minister has warned.
Writing in The Guardian, Sir Keir Starmer said he was "thinking about the long-term,... [4261 chars]

title: Russia and Ukraine agree to truce for Orthodox Easter
description: Vladimir Putin announced the truce, which will last from Saturday afternoon on 11 April through Easter Sunday.
content:
Russia and Ukraine have agreed to a truce for Orthodox Easter, with Vladimir Putin saying he's ordered Russian troops to cease fire "in all directions" this weekend.
The declaration from Moscow came after Volodymyr Zelensky issued repeated calls for ... [2589 chars]
